closeout_note: MasterSummary.v now sets verification_scope_includes_full_state_equivalence = true. All 11 canonical vm_state fields are verified bit-for-bit across OCaml, Python, and RTL by the bitlock gate (test_bitlock_proof_vm_cpu.py).
nonclaim: The abstract HardwareBisimulation.v theorem still proves PC/mu agreement only; full-register and full-memory Coq theorems are not yet exported from that abstract model.
